title: [codereview-pass2/3] senml.h: senml_encode_deaddrop decl added matching temperature pattern; P4 consistency: add LICHEN_WARN_UNUSED_RESULT to all encode_* convenience funcs for API contract
description: After adding decl for deaddrop (to fix undefined reference in coap_dtn.c), review found that only senml_encode_cbor has the warn_unused attribute. The 3 convenience encoders (location, battery, temperature, and now deaddrop) return important length-or-error and should warn if unused. This is P4 style/consistency per AGENTS.md coding guidelines. Fix in senml.h only per task scope. Matches location pattern in convenience section. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-joq7
